_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of configuration management tools and techniques
reference_document_element_description: Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications, including environment configuration, dependency specification, secrets management, and environment parity maintenance.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Task TF-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-011 (DA, cosine: 0.569), DA-K-009 (DA, cosine: 0.515).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.614). Shared vocabulary: [configuration, management]. NICE-only terms [knowledge, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, data, dependency, development, environment, environments] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.877, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.020 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of configuration management tools and techniques" and "Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 ≈ STS 0.614 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [configuration, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [configuration, management]. NICE-only: [knowledge, techniques, tools]. WIDAI-only: [applications, data, dependency, development, environment, environments].
